summary: A wargaming and crisis-analysis portfolio surface.
final_use_case: It shows how strategic problems can be made inspectable through structured play, cell roles, scenario events, evidence matrices, measurement, and escalation logic rather than reduced to static policy commentary.

instruments.instrument_name: Wargaming — theater-level alliance-crisis wargame workbench Artifact Identity Register
instruments.input: packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination
instruments.operation: A wargaming and crisis-analysis portfolio surface.; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
instruments.output: what the packet is and what decision it can still change

instruments.downstream_use: Feeds what the packet is and what decision it can still change; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.status: Status: The Battle Plan Order Toolbar, ACH matrix, KAC checklist, MSEL inject deck, escalation ladder, and ten-dimension scoring rubric all render at full.

instruments.instrument_name: Wargaming — theater-level alliance-crisis wargame workbench Mechanism Or Claim Distillation
instruments.input: the packet's central method, model, concept, or design rule
instruments.operation: It organizes theater-level alliance-crisis scenarios through Blue Cell, Red Cell, and White Cell roles, decision points, ambiguity traps, distraction windows, slow-fade escalation, nine-move Master Scenario Events Lists, battle-plan orders, four-hypothesis-by-ten-evidence ACH matrices, five-assumption Key Assumptions Checks, ten-dimension measurement, and post-run assessment.
instruments.output: the distinctive idea that should not disappear in public summary
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires the packet's central method, model, concept, or design rule
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds the distinctive idea that should not disappear in public summary; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.

instruments.instrument_name: Wargaming — theater-level alliance-crisis wargame workbench Proof Boundary
instruments.input: built assets, partial assets, archive-only assets, and unsupported claims
instruments.operation: The wargame is a theater-level analytical workbench. The Battle Plan Order Toolbar, ACH matrix, KAC checklist, MSEL inject deck, escalation ladder, and ten-dimension scoring rubric all render at full density. HOI4 sprite assets are bundled. Branch-distribution, adjudicator-variance, cost-asymmetry, and coverage-lanes panels each carry their own enumerated point sets. Open work: source-register lineage is missing — the visual claims rest on the same retrofit snippets quarantined elsewhere in the portfolio.
instruments.output: what the packet proves now as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires built assets, partial assets, archive-only assets, and unsupported claims
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds what the packet proves now as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: what the packet proves now as a reviewable artifact
instruments.status: Status: The Battle Plan Order Toolbar, ACH matrix, KAC checklist, MSEL inject deck, escalation ladder, and ten-dimension scoring rubric all render at full.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept built assets, partial assets, archive-only assets, and unsupported claims and produce what the packet proves now as a reviewable artifact.
instruments.verification_check: Test one representative case; confirm input (built assets, partial assets, archive-only assets...) produces output (what the packet proves now as a reviewable artifact) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
